ddls:
CREATE TABLE "student_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the student group (e.g., All Students, Asian, Black, Hispanic, White) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the student group */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility to join the student group */,
  "funding_status" INTEGER /* Funding status for the student group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Current Rate, Three-Year Rate, Annual Target, Long-Term Goal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula for calculating the performance metric */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target (e.g., Annual Target) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Value of the target */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year the target is set for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal (e.g., Long-Term Goal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "goal_value" REAL /* Value of the goal */,
  "goal_year" INTEGER /* Year the goal is set for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_group_metrics" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the student group */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the metric value is for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_group_targets" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the target for the student group */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the target value is for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_group_goals" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the goal for the student group */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the goal value is for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school belongs to */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the district belongs to */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., northeast, south, midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group the student belongs to */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_interventions" (
  "progress_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress intervention entry */,
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* ID of the progress entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the progress for the intervention */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_interventions_progress_id FOREIGN KEY ("progress_id") REFERENCES progress ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_interventions_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)
